name: Boston Chicken Baked Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 Jar Great Northern beans, drained (24 ounces)
1/2 Cup Open Pit Hickory Flavored BBQ Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. While onions are softening, empty the jar of Great Northern beans into a 4-quart baking dish or pan.
3. Add the drained Pork & Beans to the beans in the dish.
4. Stir in the onion (cooked in hot water for 5 minutes), ketchup, BBQ sauce, and chopped boiled ham.
5. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F for about 30-35 minutes, or until piping hot.
6. Stir occasionally during baking.
7. Refrigerate covered to use within 1 week.
8. Freeze for up to 4 months.
